name: Charismatic Aura
description: The caster chooses one distinct aura effect when the spell is invoked.

range.summary: Self; affects those within 10 ft (3.0 m).

effectProfiles.name: Charm
effectProfiles.description: Victims regard the caster as a trusted friend; save vs magic to resist.

effectProfiles.name: Fear
effectProfiles.description: Victims are intimidated by the caster's presence.

effectProfiles.name: Authority
effectProfiles.description: Victims defer to the caster as a figure of command.
